title: Adam and Evil
writer: F. Hugh Herbert, Florence Ryerson, Ralph Spence
actors: Lew Cody, Aileen Pringle, Gwen Lee
plot: A wealthy society wife discovers her husband's long-hidden secret--he has a brother, who is not only his twin but his "evil" twin. The long-lost brother shows up at the couple's doorstep one day and proceeds to turn their life ups...
